feedItems.description: allocated £4.6m to Environment & Streets (≈£51 per resident)
allocated £1.4m to Culture & Leisure (≈£15 per resident)
allocated £3.2m to Council Running Costs (≈£35 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £84 (3.9%) to £2227
